overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic countryside path and crossing a historic covered stone bridge. The scene features vibrant spring vegetation, a turquoise lake, and Mediterranean-style stone architecture under a bright teal sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path with stone walls and flowering trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path, sword on back, moving toward the distant bridge

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the path
white flowering bushes and trees lining the path
turquoise lake visible through the trees on the left
hazy mountains on the horizon under the teal sky
winding dirt trail with patches of grass
rustic wooden fence posts along the right side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path bordered by stone walls and flowering white trees. A turquoise lake is visible to the left with distant mountains under a bright sky, while a wooden fence lines the right side of the trail.

events.description: NPC woman with straw hat and basket enters frame from right and walks alongside path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the stone bridge, passing a peasant woman

notable_agents.action: woman carrying basket walking in same direction then falling behind

entered.detail: large stone archway of the bridge visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The path curves toward a large stone bridge ahead. A peasant woman with a basket appears walking alongside the path. The stone walls shift to the left side as flowering trees appear on the right.

events.description: character steps from dirt path onto stone bridge ramp
character begins ascending the inclined bridge ramp

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined stone ramp of the bridge toward the archway

notable_agents.action: guard standing at the bridge entrance watching the approach

entered.detail: inclined stone ramp leading up to the bridge arch

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps onto the stone bridge ramp and begins ascending. A guard stands near the entrance as the path transitions from dirt to worn stone tiles. The lake view shifts to the right side as the bridge arch looms closer.

events.description: entering covered bridge section creates dramatic shadow and light contrast with wooden beams
wooden roof beams temporarily obscure the sky view overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered section of the bridge, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction through the covered bridge

entered.detail: wooden roof structure covering the bridge with open sides
thick wooden beams supporting the roof overhead
stone railing wall on the left side of the bridge
stone railing wall on the right side overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the covered section of the bridge with wooden roof beams overhead. Light streams through openings creating dramatic shadows. Another pedestrian walks in the opposite direction as the view opens to the lake on the right through the stone parapets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a scenic countryside path that gradually leads into the sheltered interior of a historic stone bridge. It begins with Geralt walking a winding dirt trail bordered by stone walls and flowering white trees, with a turquoise lake and distant mountains visible to the left. As the path curves, the scenery shifts with flowering trees moving to the right and a peasant woman appearing alongside the trail before the camera approaches a large stone bridge. The scene then transitions as Geralt ascends the bridge ramp, moving from dirt to worn stone tiles past a stationed guard while the lake view shifts to the right. Finally, the camera enters the covered section of the bridge, where wooden roof beams create dramatic shadows and the open landscape is glimpsed through the stone parapets.
